calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-22-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Browne for (petitioner) Robert Milam.

The Court stated that an issue was raised regarding the claim for legal services prior to the death of decedent, that it was not properly filed but that the beneficiary is in agreement with it. Mr. Browne reported that he was unaware of the statutory requirements for approval, that he did not realize that the approval filed on 6/17/14 was without signature, that the claim was paid, that the issue was brought to his attention by the probate examiner, that he has since filed a creditors claim and that the executor has been advised of his right to consult outside counsel. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
